## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is ramping up, with 15 new MCP-related topics/outlines and 2 published articles since last meeting](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Traffic metrics are holding steady, with \~260 organic users/week visiting the blog](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Team is aiming to reach 5 articles/week publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Feedback on content quality: need for more practical, useful content and less AI-generated phrasing](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [15 new MCP-related topics/outlines created](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [2 articles published since last meeting, 3 ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [8 outlines/articles currently under review](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Organic blog traffic: 400+ views/week, 260+ users, 1.5 pages/visit, 40+ seconds avg. time on site](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Aiming for 5 articles/week publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

### Content Quality and Feedback

  - [Need for more practical, useful content that practitioners can act on](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Concerns about AI-generated phrasing and formulaic writing](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Suggestion to include thesis statements for each section in outlines](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Request for better high-level feedback implementation](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### MCP Content Strategy

  - [Discussion on balancing MCP content with other topics](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Suggestion to create an "ultimate guide" or content package for MCP security](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Need to broaden MCP content beyond just identity-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Suggestion to leave overarching feedback in Google Docs instead of Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Request for Slack notifications when assigned tasks in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Discussion on implementing a sanity check before content reaches final review](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

### Writing Guidelines

  - [Preference for N-dashes with spaces instead of M-dashes](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Avoid obvious AI-generated phrasing and formulaic writing](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)

### Upcoming Changes

  - [Plans to implement agentic pipelines for improved content quality](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
  - [Exploration of partnership opportunities for more in-depth content](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement thesis statements for each section in outlines](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Explore Airtable automation for task assignment notifications](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Review and update writing guidelines to address AI-generated phrasing](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Implement sanity check process before final content review](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Continue focus on reaching 5 articles/week publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Explore creation of "ultimate guide" or content package for MCP security](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Ehtisham and Kyle to discuss process improvements internally](https://fathom.video/share/dcGxFxaTASygHgt5E_AuPzy6xuNUaQQG?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
